descriptionEn:
L.A.P Grillhouse

Located in Loutra, Agia Paraskevi, L.A.P Grillhouse is the perfect destination for anyone who enjoys authentic Greek barbecue and freshly grilled specialties. With its relaxed atmosphere and warm hospitality, the restaurant combines traditional recipes with fresh ingredients to create a memorable dining experience in the heart of the Kassandra peninsula.

The menu features a wide selection of grilled favorites, including gyros, souvlaki, burgers, pork chops, juicy steaks, traditional appetizers, fresh salads, and homemade side dishes. Every meal is carefully prepared and served in generous portions, showcasing the rich flavors of authentic Greek cuisine.

Whether you're stopping by for a quick lunch after the beach or enjoying a leisurely dinner with family and friends, L.A.P Grillhouse offers delicious food, friendly service, and the welcoming atmosphere that makes every visit a pleasure.
